title: troximon grandiflorum
intro: Troximon grandiflorum, also known as Yellow Gentian, is a flowering plant species native to Western North America. The roots and rhizomes of Troximon grandiflorum have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Troximon grandiflorum is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in infusions or capsules.
